calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Ann Mendoza, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner, Erik Taing present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Trevor T. Belmont.
Decree signed in open court.
